text: All comparables have been found on the eastside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of zero lot lines of a similar location, design, quality, condition, age, room count, GLA, and basement finish. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 6.7% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its lack of a finished basement and fireplace count. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, basement finished room count, and fireplace count. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its view, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, and fireplace count. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.
